signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.37 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; Middle East tensions introduce intervention risk on a break above 160.00. JPY COT LF short −65,309 (crowded carry). Carry dominates until VIX > 25; 160.00 is the key intervention threshold.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +41,675 vs ATM IV 9.5% near HV; 25d RR flat — options neutral. AUD/USD at 0.7154; positioning stalling — late-trend caution signal. A LF delta turning positive or AM reducing would invalidate the caution read.

signals.title: EUR — G8 Outperformance
signals.text: EUR leads G8 losers (−0.483% avg, 7 pairs) while CAD leads gainers (+0.468% avg, 3 pairs); G8 spread: 0.951%. EUR underperformance relative to peers; BoE vs ECB rate divergence not the driver.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral; GBP LF net long +28,426. GBP/USD at 1.3531 mid-range; ATM IV 9.5% near HV, 25d RR flat — options neutral.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −17,090 vs RBNZ hike 100% priced for 27 May. Short-squeeze risk elevated if RBNZ delivers hike; crowded spec short unwind targets 0.5900+. NZD/USD at 0.5884.
